name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Console: new Nationality field when adding or editing a manager/staff account (Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippine, Cambodia, Others) — shown as a short tag (MY/ID/PH/CA/Other) next to their role.
Work Shifts/Off Day: the Off-day counts table has a new Nationality column, a nationality filter in its header, and now shows 10 at a time with a View more button.
Needs a one-time database update from the owner (migration-010.sql) before nationality can be saved.
